proposal_text:
Title: Edo's Whispering Leaves
Concept: Cultivate connections, shape destinies: Your story unfolds in Edo's refined teahouses.
Website Product Description: Step into the serene and sophisticated world of Edo-period Japan, where the most pivotal events unfold not on battlefields, but within the tranquil walls of hidden teahouses. In "Edo's Whispering Leaves," you are a master of subtle influence, navigating a rich tapestry of relationships and conversations. Every shared cup of tea, every whispered word, holds the power to shape your destiny and the fate of those around you.

Engage in deep, meaningful interactions with a vibrant cast of characters, from cunning merchants to esteemed artists and influential samurai. Your choices in conversation aren't just dialogue; they are investments in 'moral capital' and 'social influence,' allowing you to subtly guide events, uncover secrets, and forge powerful alliances. Experience a historical game unlike any other, where wisdom, empathy, and strategy are your greatest tools. Cultivate connections, earn trust, and leave your indelible mark on the historical currents of Edo, one meaningful interaction at a time. Discover a world where quiet moments hold profound power.

Title: Epoch of Allegiance
Concept: Command your destiny where trust is a weapon and loyalty, your shield.
Website Product Description: Step into a sprawling world where every choice reverberates across nations. In Epoch of Allegiance, you will lead your empire through eras of conflict and diplomacy. Build mighty armies and fortify your borders, earning powerful military advantages as your people's unwavering loyalty grows. Shape your economy by managing vital trade routes, but beware: fragile trust can lead to devastating resource penalties. Influence the global stage with cunning whispers and strategic rumors—spread tales of a rival's failing health to sow discord, or uncover hidden resource riches to bolster your own standing. Your leadership will be tested as you navigate intricate political landscapes, where alliances are forged and broken, and the fate of your empire rests on your ability to inspire allegiance and exploit the weaknesses of your foes. Will you rise to conquer, or fall victim to the shifting tides of trust?
